args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts
- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware, createHandlersInterface
- Reads as: TypeScript type definitions and class implementation for factory pattern
- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/hono-base, src/types
- Safe summary: Factory helper provides factory class and functions for creating Hono app instances and handlers with environment and path generic support, includes 10 handler overload variants

## src/helper/route/index.ts
- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
- Reads as: Utility functions for extracting route information from context
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/request/constants, src/utils/url, src/types
- Safe summary: Route helper exports functions to get matched route arrays and path information including base paths with parameter substitution for nested routing

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSMessageReceive, createWSMessageEvent, WSContextInit
- Reads as: TypeScript interfaces, types, and class for WebSocket upgrade handling
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types, src/utils/http-status
- Safe summary: WebSocket helper provides defineWebSocketHelper function for creating WebSocket upgrade handlers with WSContext class managing send/close operations and event listeners

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
- Reads as: Cookie manipulation functions for reading/writing cookies with signed support
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/cookie
- Safe summary: Cookie helper exports functions for reading cookies by key, generating signed and unsigned cookies, setting cookies with headers, and supporting __Secure- and __Host- prefixes

## src/helper/testing/index.ts
- Main exports or names: testClient
- Reads as: Function for creating test clients for Hono apps
- Neighbor files: src/client, src/context, src/hono, src/types, src/utils/types
- Safe summary: Testing helper provides testClient function that creates a typed client from a Hono app with custom fetch implementation for test environments

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals, Runtime type
- Reads as: Runtime detection utility with environment access helpers
- Neighbor files: src/context
- Safe summary: Adapter helper exports env function for accessing runtime environment variables and getRuntimeKey for detecting execution runtime including node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, and edge-light

## src/helper/css/index.ts
- Main exports or names: createCssContext, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, ClassNameSlug, OnInvalidSlug, DefaultContextType
- Reads as: Experimental CSS-in-JS helper with context creation and utility functions
- Neighbor files: src/helper/html, src/jsx/constants, src/jsx/dom/css, src/utils/html, src/css/common
- Safe summary: CSS helper provides createCssContext for creating CSS context with css/cx/keyframes/viewTransition functions and Style component for server-side and client-side CSS class name generation

## src/helper/css/common.ts
- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, buildStyleString, PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, toHash, minify, rawCssString
- Reads as: Utility functions for building CSS strings and class names with hash generation
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts
- Safe summary: CSS common helper exports buildStyleString for template string processing, toHash for class name hashing, minify for CSS compression, and shared utilities for cssCommon/cxCommon/keyframesCommon/viewTransitionCommon

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
- Main exports or names: proxy, hopByHopHeaders, buildRequestInitFromRequest, preprocessRequestInit, ProxyFetch, ProxyRequestInit
- Reads as: Proxy fetch wrapper with RFC 9110 compliance options
- Neighbor files: src/http-exception, src/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Proxy helper exports proxy function for making proxied requests with hop-by-hop header filtering, strict Connection header processing option, and custom fetch support

## src/helper/dev/index.ts
- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName, RouteData, ShowRoutesOptions, handlerName
- Reads as: Development utilities for inspecting and displaying route information
- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
- Safe summary: Dev helper exports inspectRoutes for extracting route metadata, showRoutes for console output formatting with optional colorization, and getRouterName for identifying router type

## src/helper/html/index.ts
- Main exports or names: html, raw
- Reads as: HTML escaping and rendering utility for template strings
- Neighbor files: src/utils/html
- Safe summary: HTML helper exports html function for escaping template string interpolation and raw function for unescaped content with callback support for async operations

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, ToSSGResult, ToSSGOptions, SSGPlugin
- Reads as: Static site generation utilities exporting core functions and plugins
- Neighbor files: src/ssg/ssg, src/ssg/middleware, src/ssg/utils, src/utils/concurrent, src/utils/mime, src/ssg/plugins
- Safe summary: SSG helper exports toSSG function for generating static files, fetchRoutesContent for concurrent route fetching, and middleware functions for SSG parameter handling with plugin system support

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
- Main exports or names: fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, toSSG, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin, SSGPlugin, ToSSGOptions
- Reads as: Core SSG generation logic with parallel fetching and file saving
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg, src/ssg/middleware, src/ssg/utils, src/utils/concurrent, src/utils/mime, src/ssg/plugins
- Safe summary: SSG core helper exports fetchRoutesContent generator for parallel route content fetching, saveContentToFile for writing generated files, toSSG main function with plugin hook support and concurrency options

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
- Reads as: Path manipulation utilities for SSG
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg
- Safe summary: SSG utils exports dirname for path parent extraction, joinPaths for cross-platform path joining, filterStaticGenerateRoutes for GET route filtering, isDynamicRoute for parameter detection, ensureWithinOutDir for path traversal protection

## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSGParamsMiddleware, SSGParams, AddedSSGDataRequest, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
- Reads as: Middleware functions for SSG context detection and parameter handling
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg, src/helper/ssg/ssg, src/helper/ssg/utils
- Safe summary: SSG middleware exports ssgParams for attaching params to request context, isSSGContext for checking SSG context flag, disableSSG for preventing SSG generation, onlySSG for SSG-only routes

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEMessage, SSEStreamingApi, streamingApi, SSEStreamingApi
- Reads as: Streaming helper exporting multiple stream types for SSE and text
- Neighbor files: src/streaming/stream, src/streaming/sse, src/streaming/text, src/utils/stream
- Safe summary: Streaming helper exports stream for generic streaming, streamSSE for Server-Sent Events with event/id/retry support, streamText for text/plain streaming with Content-Type headers

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi, contextStash, TransformStream, isOldBunVersion
- Reads as: Base streaming implementation with response handling
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming, src/utils/stream
- Safe summary: Streaming stream helper exports stream function for creating streamed responses with TransformStream, contextStash for holding context during streaming, and Bun version compatibility handling for abort detection

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage, TransformStream, isOldBunVersion, Transfer-Encoding, Content-Type
- Reads as: SSE-specific streaming with event format handling
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming, src/helper/streaming/stream, src/helper/streaming/text, src/utils/html, src/utils/stream, src/helper/streaming/utils
- Safe summary: SSE helper exports streamSSE function for Server-Sent Events with data/event/id/retry fields, SSEStreamingApi extending StreamingApi with writeSSE method, Transfer-Encoding chunked headers, and event validation

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Main exports or names: streamText, TEXT_PLAIN, X-Content-Type-Options, Transfer-Encoding
- Reads as: Text streaming wrapper with proper headers
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming, src/helper/streaming/stream, src/context, src/utils/stream
- Safe summary: Streaming text helper exports streamText function that wraps stream with TEXT_PLAIN Content-Type, X-Content-Type-Options nosniff, and Transfer-Encoding chunked headers for text streaming

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts
- Reads as: Accept header parsing utility for content negotiation
- Neighbor files: src/accepts/accepts, src/utils/accept, src/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Accepts helper exports accepts function for matching Accept headers against supported types with q-value sorting, default match fallback, and custom match function support

## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts, defaultMatch, Accept, acceptsConfig, acceptsOptions, parseAccept
- Reads as: Content negotiation utility with header parsing and type matching
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts, src/context, src/utils/accept, src/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Accepts core helper exports accepts function matching Accept headers, defaultMatch for q-value sorted selection with fallback, Accept interface for parsed types, and configuration for header/support/default fields

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Main exports or names: GetConnInfo, AddressType, NetAddrInfo, ConnInfo, ConnInfo type
- Reads as: Connection information type definitions and helper exports
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/types
- Safe summary: ConnInfo helper exports GetConnInfo function type and re-exports AddressType, NetAddrInfo, and ConnInfo interfaces for connection metadata including remote address and port information

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Main exports or names: AddressType, NetAddrInfo, ConnInfo, GetConnInfo, transport, port, address
- Reads as: TypeScript interfaces for connection information structure
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo
- Safe summary: ConnInfo types exports ConnInfo interface with remote NetAddrInfo field, NetAddrInfo with transport/port/address/addressType properties, AddressType as IPv4|IPv6|undefined, and GetConnInfo type for context accessor
